name: Inventory Planner
body: [{"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Inventory Planner."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://inventory-planner.com/", "children": [{"text": "Visit Add-On Website"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://help.inventory-planner.com/en/", "children": [{"text": "contact Inventory Planner"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Inventory Planner add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel click "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": " in the main menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the Inventory Management section locate the Inventory Planner add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create an account on\u00a0"}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://inventory-planner.com", "children": [{"text": "inventory-planner.com"}]}, {"text": " if you haven't already."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select your platform as "}, {"text": "Neto\u00a0", "bold": true}, {"text": "or Neto."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Follow instructions on the set-up page on the Inventory Management site."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "It will request an API key which is associated with a staff user in Neto. To get this, navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Staff Users", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click on the staff user you wish to associate the account with. Scroll down to "}, {"text": "API Key", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click the "}, {"text": "Regenerate", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}]}]
